msg.selection.none: آ§8[آ§3WGNآ§8] آ§eâڑ  آ§7Make a selection first â€” get the wand with آ§f/rg wand آ§7then left/right-click two corners آ§8(آ§7or آ§f/rg pos1 //rg pos2آ§8)آ§7.

flag.build.desc: Allow or deny breaking and placing blocks in general.
flag.block-break.desc: Allow or deny block breaking specifically.
flag.block-place.desc: Allow or deny block placement specifically.
flag.interact.desc: Allow or deny right-click interactions with blocks and entities.
flag.use.desc: Allow or deny using items (food, potions, doors).
flag.chest-access.desc: Allow or deny opening containers (chests, barrels, hoppers).
flag.sleep.desc: Allow or deny sleeping in beds.
flag.tnt.desc: Allow or deny TNT explosion damage to blocks.
flag.creeper-explosion.desc: Allow or deny creeper explosion damage to blocks.
flag.ghast-fireball.desc: Allow or deny ghast/fireball explosion damage to blocks.
flag.enderdragon.desc: Allow or deny ender-dragon block destruction.
flag.other-explosion.desc: Allow or deny explosions not covered by the more specific flags.
flag.fire-spread.desc: Allow or deny fire propagating across blocks.
flag.lava-fire.desc: Allow or deny lava igniting nearby blocks.
flag.lightning.desc: Allow or deny lightning strikes affecting the region.
flag.mob-spawning.desc: Allow or deny natural mob spawning.
flag.mob-damage.desc: Allow or deny players attacking mobs.
flag.player-damage.desc: Allow or deny generic damage to players from non-player sources.
flag.fall-damage.desc: Allow or deny fall damage to players.
flag.fire-damage.desc: Allow or deny fire-related damage to players.
flag.suffocation-damage.desc: Allow or deny suffocation damage (in walls).
flag.vehicle-destroy.desc: Allow or deny destroying minecarts and boats.
flag.keep-inventory.desc: Keep player items on death inside this region.
flag.keep-xp.desc: Keep player XP on death inside this region.
flag.mob-teleport.desc: Allow or deny mob teleports (Endermen, Shulker bullets).
flag.mob-grief.desc: Allow or deny mobs changing blocks (enderman pick/place, sheep eating grass, etc.).
flag.item-pickup.desc: Allow or deny picking up ground items.
flag.item-drop.desc: Allow or deny dropping items on the ground.
flag.entry.desc: Allow or deny entering the region (non-bypass players).
flag.exit.desc: Allow or deny leaving the region.
flag.entry-vehicle.desc: Allow or deny entering the region while riding a vehicle.
flag.exit-vehicle.desc: Allow or deny leaving the region while riding a vehicle.
flag.pistons.desc: Allow or deny pistons pushing/pulling blocks across the region border.
flag.redstone.desc: Allow or deny redstone signal propagation within the region.
flag.dispenser-output.desc: Allow or deny dispenser/dropper output (items, fluids, projectiles). Also blocks firing across a region border.
flag.leaf-decay.desc: Allow or deny natural leaf decay.
flag.grass-spread.desc: Allow or deny grass block spreading.
flag.crop-growth.desc: Allow or deny crop growth (wheat, beets, etc).
flag.frosted-ice-melt.desc: Allow or deny frost-walker ice melting.
flag.send-chat.desc: Allow or deny sending chat from within the region.
flag.receive-chat.desc: Allow or deny receiving other players' chat while inside the region.
flag.invincible.desc: Make players invincible inside the region.
flag.hunger-drain.desc: Allow or deny hunger draining inside the region.
flag.greeting.desc: Message shown to players entering the region.
flag.farewell.desc: Message shown to players leaving the region.
flag.deny-message.desc: Custom message shown on protection denial.
flag.entry-deny-message.desc: Custom message shown when entry is denied.
flag.exit-deny-message.desc: Custom message shown when exit is denied.
flag.heal-max-hp.desc: Auto-heal will not go above this HP.
flag.heal-min-hp.desc: Auto-heal will not trigger below this HP.
flag.feed-max-hunger.desc: Auto-feed will not go above this hunger.
flag.feed-min-hunger.desc: Auto-feed will not trigger above this hunger.
flag.max-speed.desc: Maximum movement speed inside the region.
flag.deny-spawn.desc: Entity IDs whose spawn is denied.
flag.on-entry.desc: Console command run when a player enters (%player%, %region%, %world%).
flag.on-exit.desc: Console command run when a player leaves (%player%, %region%, %world%).
flag.blocked-effects.desc: Potion effects suppressed inside the region.
flag.game-mode.desc: Force a specific game mode (survival, creative, ...).
flag.time-lock.desc: Lock client-side time (day, night, sunrise, sunset, or numeric).
